coverage_note: The Banque d'Algérie agréé roster (21 banks + 8 financial institutions) is complete. Branch locations cover all 21 banks' own locators (1,704 branches); 1,213 carry a geocoded point, the rest are address-only per each bank's published data (see README).

sources.name: Banque d'Algérie — liste des banques et établissements financiers agréés (JO n° 9, 6 février 2026)
Each licensed bank's own branch locator (site/API/KML)
